title: Two earbuds screen/second screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Tapping left circle button on earbud visualization screen zooms in and out instead of performing expected action
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Tap on the connected earbud device name or icon to access the Device Settings screen.
On the Device Settings screen, locate the earbud visualization (two earbuds/second screen).
Tap the left circle button on the earbud visualization.
Observe the screen zoom in and new text appear.
Tap the same left circle button again.
Observe the screen zoom out to the original view.
expected: Tapping the left circle button on the earbud visualization should toggle between zoomed-in (with additional text) and zoomed-out (original) views smoothly.
